description: Recto: part of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Letter of appeal for charity. The sender has been in difficult straits for three years. Verso: unidentified text in Hebrew, possibly part of a letter, containing the honorific זקל (for a saintly person or martyr) and the name Ḥananya (חנניהו). This might be the introduction to the begging letter, with many honorifics and blessings for the addressee. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
